## Outcome

Describe the profile or portfolio signal this change improves.

## Evidence

- [ ] Every repository claim points to merged public work.
- [ ] Test, coverage, build, security, and supply-chain claims match executable workflows.
- [ ] Adoption and collaboration targets are not written as completed outcomes.
- [ ] Clinical, privacy, regulatory, or production-readiness claims remain explicitly bounded.
- [ ] The visible quality matrix still matches the repository sections above it.

## Validation

- [ ] `node scripts/validate-profile.mjs`
- [ ] Profile Quality workflow passes and retains its report.
